description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was stopped while waiting to make a left turn, when it was rear-ended by a passenger vehicle. The Zoox 
vehicle incurred minor damage to its sensors and rear bumper. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
